summary: Brother visited for 30min, brought clean clothes; updated on smooth recovery.
Wife asked about discharge; informed POD#3 likely.
Daughter anxious; explained ICU not needed, telemetry monitoring overnight, glucose stabilising.
Daughter visited 1h; reviewed care plan, glycaemic targets, anticoagulation restart timing.
Son requested cardiology update; provided summary of consult.
Daughter messaged for morning status; replied stable, glucose 9.2, plan unchanged.
Daughter asking about safe visit time; recommended after 2pm when PT done.
